message:
fix(curate): Prevent resurrection of deprecated/blocked rules

When an add delta's content matches a deprecated bullet, the old behavior
would reinforce it via a helpful feedback event. This created "zombie
rules" that could resurface blocked content.

Changes:
- Check if similar bullet is deprecated before reinforcing
- Check if target playbook's copy is deprecated before reinforcing
- Skip with clear decision log entry instead of creating feedback

This ensures deprecated rules stay deprecated even when new sessions
produce similar content.
